jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Melano, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Unisciti al nostro team come Data Center Technician a Melano, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture del data center di livello mondiale.

Mansioni

- Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete
- Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni
- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)
- Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi
- Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset
- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni
- Partecipa alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti

- 3+ anni di esperienza nelle operazioni di data center
- Competenze esperte di alimentazione (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)
- Forti capacità di risolvere problemi e problem-solving
- Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack
- Conoscenza della distribuzione di energia e sistemi UPS
- Eccellenti capacità di documentazione e comunicazione
- Capacità di sollevare oltre 50 lbs e lavorare in ambienti impegnati
- Certificazioni di data center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferibile
- Certificazioni vendor (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferibile
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferibile
- Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferibile
- Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferibile

Cosa?

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuale)
- Pacchetto di beneficiari completo tra cui:
- Assicurazione sanitaria, dentale e visiva
- Congedo retribuito e festività
- Indennità per sviluppo professionale
- Sponsorizzazione per certificazioni

Orario di lavoro

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Orari di lavoro standard con rotazione di reperibilità
- Differenziali per turni notturni/weekend quando applicabili

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Muttenz, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work
• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues
• Document all work with photos and detailed notes
• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience
• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)
• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments
• Own transportation and ability to work on-site
• Professional communication skills in English
• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred
• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred
• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred
• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred
• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Muttenz, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Unisciti al nostro team come Data Center Technician a Muttenz, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture del data center di livello mondiale.

Mansioni

- Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete
- Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni
- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)
- Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi
- Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset
- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni
- Partecipa alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti

- 3+ anni di esperienza operativa del data center
- Capacità di cablaggio esperto (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2)
- Forti capacità di risoluzione dei problemi e risoluzione dei problemi
- Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack
- Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS
- Eccellente documentazione e capacità di comunicazione
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti esigenti
- Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferito
- Certificazioni del venditore (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferito
- Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferito
- Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferito

Compenso e Benefici

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuale)
- pacchetto completo di benefici tra cui:
- Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione
- Tempo libero pagato e vacanze
- Indennità di sviluppo professionale
- Certificazione di sponsorizzazione

Orario di lavoro

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

- Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten

- Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt

- Wissen über ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

Compenso e Benefici

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF jährlich)
- Umfassendes Leistungspaket inklusive:
- Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung
- Bezahlte Zeit ab und Urlaub

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Olten, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Unisciti al nostro team come tecnico del Data Center di Olten, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture del data center di livello mondiale.

Mansioni

- Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete
- Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni
- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)
- Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi
- Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset
- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni
- Partecipa alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti

- 3+ anni di esperienza operativa del data center
- Capacità di cablaggio esperto (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2)
- Forti capacità di risoluzione dei problemi e risoluzione dei problemi
- Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack
- Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS
- Eccellente documentazione e capacità di comunicazione
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti esigenti
- Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferito
- Certificazioni del venditore (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferito
- Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferito
- Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferito

Cosa?

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (annuale CHF CF)
- pacchetto completo di benefici tra cui:
- Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione
- Tempo libero pagato e vacanze
- Indennità di sviluppo professionale
- Certificazione di sponsorizzazione
- Programma di lavoro
- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

Besuchen Sie unser Team als Data Center Technician in Olten, Schweiz. Dies ist eine Vollzeit-, Standortposition, in der Sie kritische Infrastruktur in erstklassigen Rechenzentrumseinrichtungen unterstützen.

Mansion

- Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten
- Strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser) durchführen

- Überwachung von Umweltsystemen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit)

- Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades

- Starke Fehlersuche und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten
- Erfahrung mit Regal- und Stapelarbeiten
- Verständnis der Stromverteilung und der UPS-Systeme
- Ausgezeichnete Dokumentation und Kommunikationsfähigkeit
- Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten

- Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt

- Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt
- Wissen über ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

Cosa offriamo

- Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Plan-les-Ouates, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Unisciti al nostro team come Data Center Technician in Plan-les-Ouates, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture del data center di livello mondiale.

Mansioni

- Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete
- Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni
- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)
- Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi
- Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset
- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni
- Partecipa alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti

- 3+ anni di esperienza operativa del data center
- Capacità di cablaggio esperto (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2)
- Forti capacità di risoluzione dei problemi e risoluzione dei problemi
- Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack
- Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS
- Eccellente documentazione e capacità di comunicazione
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti esigenti
- Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferito
- Certificazioni del venditore (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferito
- Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferito
- Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferito

Cosa?

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (annuale CHF CF)

- Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione
- Tempo libero pagato e vacanze

- Programma di lavoro
- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung

Registrieren Sie sich als Data Center Technician in Plan-les-Ouates, Schweiz. Dies ist eine Vollzeit-, Standortposition, in der Sie kritische Infrastruktur in erstklassigen Rechenzentrumseinrichtungen unterstützen.

Mansion

- Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten
- Strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser) durchführen
- Ausführen von Hardware-Bereitstellungen und Stilllegungen
- Überwachung von Umweltsystemen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit)
- Auf Vorfälle reagieren und Fehlerbehebung durchführen
- Bewahren Sie genaue Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking
- Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Betriebsteams
- Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades

Voraussetzungen

- 3+ Jahre Erfahrung im Rechenzentrum
- Expertenverkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser)
- Starke Fehlersuche und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten
- Erfahrung mit Regal- und Stapelarbeiten
- Verständnis der Stromverteilung und der UPS-Systeme
- Ausgezeichnete Dokumentation und Kommunikationsfähigkeit
- Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten
- Datacenter-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt
- Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt
- Netzwerk-Zertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt
- Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt
- Wissen über ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

Cosa offriamo

- CHF80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF-Jahr)
- Umfassendes Leistungspaket inklusive:
- Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung
- Bezahlte Zeit ab und Urlaub
- Berufsentwicklungsbeihilfe
- Zertifizierung Sponsoring
- Arbeitsplan
- Dauerstellung Vollzeit
- Standard Geschäftszeiten mit On-Call-Drehung
- Schaltdifferenzen für Nächte/Wochenende, falls zutreffend

- Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Pratteln, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)

- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni

Requisiti

- 3+ anni di esperienza operativa del data center

## Descrizione

Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Pratteln, Switzerland. This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

## Compenso e Benefici

- Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

- Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

- Experience with rack and stack operations
- Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems
- Excellent documentation and communication skills
- Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments
- Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred
- Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred
- Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred
- Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred
- Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Rafz, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

- Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation
- Participer à la planification et à la modernisation des capacités

Requisiti

- 3 ans et plus d'expérience en exploitation de data center
- Compétences de câblage expert (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2)
- Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes
- Expérience des opérations de rack et de pile
- Compréhension de la distribution d'électricité et des systèmes UPS
- Excellente capacité de documentation et de communication
- Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants
- Certifications de centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préféré
- Certification des fournisseurs (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préféré
- Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préféré
- Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préféré
Connaissance des pratiques de l ' ITIL

Cosa offriamo

- 80 000 à 100 000 francs par an (CHF annuel)
- Un ensemble complet de prestations comprenant:
- Assurance santé, soins dentaires et assurance vision
- Congés payés et jours fériés
- Indemnité de perfectionnement professionnel
- Parrainage de certification
- Calendrier des travaux
- Poste permanent à temps plein
- Heures d'ouverture standard avec rotation sur appel
- Indemnités de poste pour les nuits/semaines, le cas échéant

Contatto

*(Inserire dettagli di contatto qui)*

jobs.title: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site

titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site
titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site
titleByLocale.de: Data Center Techniker - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site
titleByLocale.fr: Data Center Technicien - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Rotkreuz, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.title: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site

titleByLocale.it: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site
titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Rotkreuz - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Rotkreuz, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

À propos du poste Nous recherchons un technicien de centre de données expérimenté pour un travail indépendant/contractuel à Ruswil, en Suisse . Il s'agit d'un poste sur site soutenant l'infrastructure essentielle à la mission dans des installations de centres de données de premier plan. Rémunération CHF35-50/h (CHF par heure) Les taux varient en fonction du niveau d'expérience et de la complexité du projet. jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Ruswil, Switzerland . This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Unisciti al nostro team come tecnico del Data Center di Ruswil, Svizzera. Questa è una posizione a tempo pieno e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture del data center di livello mondiale.

Compenso e Benefici

- CHF80.000-100.000/anno (annuale CHF CF)
- pacchetto completo di benefici tra cui:
- Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione
- Tempo libero pagato e vacanze

- Certificazione di sponsorizzazione

Orario di lavoro

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

Mansioni

- Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete
- Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni
- Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)

- Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset
- Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni
- Partecipa alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

- Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack
- Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung

Besuchen Sie unser Team als Data Center Technician in Ruswil, Schweiz. Dies ist eine Vollzeit-, Standortposition, in der Sie kritische Infrastruktur in erstklassigen Rechenzentrumseinrichtungen unterstützen.

Compenso e Benefici

- CHF80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF-Jahr)
- Umfassendes Leistungspaket inklusive:
- Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung
- Bezahlte Zeit ab und Urlaub
- Berufsentwicklungsbeihilfe
- Zertifizierung Sponsoring

Orario di lavoro

- Dauerstellung Vollzeit
- Standard Geschäftszeiten mit On-Call-Drehung
- Schaltdifferenzen für Nächte/Wochenende, falls zutreffend

Mansion

- Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten
- Strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser) durchführen
- Ausführen von Hardware-Bereitstellungen und Stilllegungen
- Überwachung von Umweltsystemen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit)
- Auf Vorfälle reagieren und Fehlerbehebung durchführen

- Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Betriebsteams
- Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades

- Verständnis der Stromverteilung und der UPS-Systeme
- Ausgezeichnete Dokumentation und Kommunikationsfähigkeit
- Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten

- Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt

- Wissen über ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Schaffhausen, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

Contatto
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione

Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Schaffhausen, Switzerland. This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

## Mansioni

- Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment
- Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)
- Execute hardware deployments and decommissions
- Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)
- Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting
- Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking
- Collaborate with engineering and operations teams
- Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

## Requisiti

- 3+ years data center operations experience
- Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)
- Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities
- Experience with rack and stack operations
- Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems
- Excellent documentation and communication skills
- Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments
- Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred
- Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred
- Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred
- Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred
- Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

## Cosa offriamo

- CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
- Comprehensive benefits package including:
  - Health, dental, and vision insurance
  - Paid time off and holidays
  - Professional development allowance
  - Certification sponsorship
- Work Schedule
  - Full-time permanent position
  - Standard business hours with on-call rotation
  - Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

## Contatto

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Schenkon, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Geneva, Switzerland . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Compensation
 CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
 Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
 Engagement Type
 
• Contract/Freelance basis

• Flexible scheduling available

• Project-based or ongoing support

• Remote hands and smart hands services

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per lavori freelance/contrattuali in Rümlang, Svizzera. Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.

Compensazione

- CHF 35-50/h (orario di CHF)
- I tassi variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. Il lavoro di emergenza e dopo l'ora può beneficiare di tariffe premium.

Tipo di Contratto

- Contratto / base di libertà
- Programmazione flessibile disponibile
- Supporto basato su progetti o in corso
- Mani remote e servizi intelligenti

Mansioni

- Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni
- Esecuzione del cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Condurre racking server, stacking, e l'etichettatura
- Eseguire le connessioni incrociate e il lavoro del pannello patch
- Risoluzione dei problemi di connettività e hardware
- Documento tutto funziona con foto e note dettagliate
- Coordinate con le squadre remote NOC e client

Requisiti

- 2+ anni di esperienza nell'infrastruttura IT
- Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomoda/multi-mode)
- Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati
- Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco
- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito
- Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung

Wir suchen einen erfahrenen Data Center Technician für Freiberufler/Vertragsarbeit in Rümlang, Schweiz. Es handelt sich um eine Position vor Ort, die missionskritische Infrastrukturen in erstklassigen Rechenzentren unterstützt.

Ausgleich

- CHF35-50/h (CHF stündlich)
- Die Preise variieren je nach Erfahrungsniveau und Projektkomplexität. Notfall- und Nachstundenarbeit kann für Prämientarife qualifizieren.

Tipo di Contratto

- Vertrags-/Freizeitbasis
- Flexible Terminierung verfügbar
- Projektbasierte oder laufende Unterstützung
- Remote Hands und Smart Hands

Mansion

- Hardwareinstallationen, Stilllegungen und Migrationen durchführen
- Execute strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser)
- Führen Sie Server-Racking, Stapeln und Etikettieren

- Probleme bei der Konnektivität und Hardware

- Datacenter-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - bevorzugt
- Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - bevorzugt
- Erfahrung mit DCIM und Fahrkartensystemen - bevorzugt
- Vertrautheit mit großen Colocation-Anbietern - bevorzugt

- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati
- Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco
- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito
- Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

Contatto
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione

We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for freelance/contract work in Meyrin, Switzerland. This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.

## Compenso

- CHF35-50/hr (CHF hourly)
- Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.

## Tipo di incarico

- Contract/Freelance basis
- Flexible scheduling available
- Project-based or ongoing support
- Remote hands and smart hands services

## Mansioni

- Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations
- Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)
- Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling
- Perform cross-connects and patch panel work
- Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues
- Document all work with photos and detailed notes
- Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

## Requisiti

- 2+ years data center o IT infrastructure experience
- Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)
- Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments
- Own transportation and ability to work on-site
- Professional communication skills in English
- Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred
- Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred
- Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred
- Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred
- Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

## Contatto
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung

Wir suchen einen erfahrenen Data Center Technician für freiberufliche/Vertragsarbeit in Meyrin, Schweiz. Es handelt sich um eine Position vor Ort, die missionskritische Infrastrukturen in erstklassigen Rechenzentren unterstützt.

Der Präsident

- CHF35-50/h (CHF stündlich)
- Die Preise variieren je nach Erfahrungsniveau und Projektkomplexität. Notfall- und Nachstundenarbeit kann für Prämientarife qualifizieren.

Tipo di incarico

- Vertrags-/Freizeitbasis
- Flexible Terminierung verfügbar
- Projektbasierte oder laufende Unterstützung
- Remote Hands und Smart Hands

Mansion

- Hardwareinstallationen, Stilllegungen und Migrationen durchführen
- Execute strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser)
- Führen Sie Server-Racking, Stapeln und Etikettieren
- Führen Sie Querverbindungen und Patch-Panel-Arbeit
- Probleme bei der Konnektivität und Hardware
- Dokumentieren Sie alle Arbeiten mit Fotos und detaillierten Notizen
- Koordination mit Remote NOC und Client-Teams

Voraussetzungen

- 2+ Jahre Rechenzentrum o IT Infrastruktur Erfahrung
- Starke Verkabelungsfertigkeiten (Cat5e/6/6a, Singlemode/Multimode-Faser)
- Erfahrung mit Serverhardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in erhöhten Bodenumgebungen zu arbeiten
- Eigene Transport- und Arbeitsfähigkeit vor Ort
- Professionelle Kommunikationsfähigkeiten auf Englisch
- Datacenter-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS oder dergleichen) - bevorzugt
- Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - bevorzugt
- Erfahrung mit DCIM und Fahrkartensystemen - bevorzugt
- Vertrautheit mit großen Colocation-Anbietern - bevorzugt
- Standard-Werkzeuge: Schraubenzieher, Kabelprüfer, Etikettenmacher, Faserprüfgeräte

descriptionByLocale.fr:

Nous recherchons un technicien expérimenté en Data Center pour le travail indépendant/contrat à Meyrin, Suisse. Il s'agit d'une position sur place qui appuie l'infrastructure essentielle de la mission dans les installations des centres de données de premier plan.

Indemnité

- 35-50 CHF/h (CHF horaire)
- Les taux varient selon le niveau d'expérience et la complexité du projet. Les travaux d'urgence et les travaux après les heures de travail peuvent bénéficier de primes.

- Base contrat/liberté
- Horaire flexible disponible

Mansioni

- Effectuer le racking, le empilage et l'étiquetage du serveur
- Effectuer des connections croisées et des travaux de panneaux de patch
- Dépannage des problèmes de connectivité et de matériel
- Documenter tout le travail avec des photos et des notes détaillées
- Coordonner avec les équipes éloignées des CNO et des clients

Requisiti

- 2 ans et plus centre de données o expérience en infrastructure informatique
- Fortes compétences de câblage (Cat5e/6/6a, fibre monomode/multimode)
- Expérience du matériel serveur (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements surélevés
- Propre transport et capacité de travailler sur place
- Compétences en communication professionnelle en anglais
- Certifications de centres de données (CDCP, CDCS ou similaires) - préféré
- Certifications réseau (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - préféré
- Expérience avec DCIM et systèmes de billetterie - préféré
- Familiarité avec les principaux fournisseurs de colocation - préférence
- Outils standard: tournevis, testeurs de câbles, fabricants d'étiquettes, équipement d'inspection de fibres

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Informazioni sul ruolo
Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per lavori freelance/contrattuali a Baar, Svizzera . Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.

- I tassi variano in base al livello di esperienza e alla complessità del progetto. Il lavoro di emergenza e dopo l'ora può beneficiare di tariffe premium.

- Contratto / base di libertà
- Programmazione flessibile disponibile
- Supporto basato su progetti o in corso

Mansioni

- Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni
- Esecuzione del cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)

- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito

- Koordination mit Remote NOC und Client-Teams

- Standard-Werkzeuge: Schraubenzieher, Kabelprüfer, Etikettenmacher, Faserprüfgeräte

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per il lavoro a tempo pieno a Stabio, CH. Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.

Tipo di Contratto

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- Opportunità di crescita della carriera
- Pacchetto Vantaggi incluso

Mansioni

- Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni
- Esecuzione del cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Condurre racking server, stacking, e l'etichettatura
- Eseguire le connessioni incrociate e il lavoro del pannello patch
- Risoluzione dei problemi di connettività e hardware
- Documento tutto funziona con foto e note dettagliate
- Coordinate con le squadre remote NOC e client

Requisiti

- 2+ anni di esperienza nell'infrastruttura IT
- Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomoda/multi-mode)
- Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati
- Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco
- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito
- Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

Descrizione

Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per il lavoro a tempo pieno a Steinhausen, CH. Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.

Tipo di Contratto

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- Opportunità di crescita della carriera
- Pacchetto Vantaggi incluso

Mansioni

- Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni
- Esecuzione del cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Condurre racking server, stacking, e l'etichettatura
- Eseguire le connessioni incrociate e il lavoro del pannello patch
- Risoluzione dei problemi di connettività e hardware
- Documento tutto funziona con foto e note dettagliate
- Coordinate con le squadre remote NOC e client

Requisiti

- 2+ anni di esperienza nell'infrastruttura IT
- Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomoda/multi-mode)
- Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati
- Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco
- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito
- Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for full-time work in Urswil, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard working hours with on-call rotation

• Career growth opportunities

• Benefits package included

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling

• Perform cross-connects and patch panel work

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

• Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per il lavoro a tempo pieno in Urswil, CH . Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.

Tipo di Contratto

- Posizione permanente a tempo pieno
- Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata
- Opportunità di crescita della carriera
- Pacchetto Vantaggi incluso

Mansioni

- Eseguire installazioni hardware, decommissioni e migrazioni
- Esecuzione del cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)
- Condurre racking server, stacking, e l'etichettatura
- Eseguire le connessioni incrociate e il lavoro del pannello patch
- Risoluzione dei problemi di connettività e hardware
- Documento tutto funziona con foto e note dettagliate
- Coordinate con le squadre remote NOC e client

Requisiti

- 2+ anni di esperienza nell'infrastruttura IT
- Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomoda/multi-mode)
- Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
- Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati
- Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco
- Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese
- Certificazioni data center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito
- Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito
- Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito
- Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito
- Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

jobs.description:
About the Role
 We are seeking an experienced Data Center Technician for full-time work in Winterthur, CH . This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
 Engagement Type
 
• Full-time permanent position

• Standard working hours with on-call rotation

• Career growth opportunities

• Benefits package included

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations

• Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Document all work with photos and detailed notes

• Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams

Requirements:
• 2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience

• Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)

• Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments

• Own transportation and ability to work on-site

• Professional communication skills in English

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred

• Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni sul ruolo
Stiamo cercando un esperto Data Center Technician per il lavoro a tempo pieno in Winterthur, CH . Si tratta di una posizione in loco che supporta l'infrastruttura mission-critical presso le principali strutture data center.
Tipo di inserimento

• Posizione permanente a tempo pieno

• Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata

• Opportunità di crescita della carriera

• Pacchetto Vantaggi inclusi

Principali responsabilità

• Eseguire installazioni hardware, dismissioni e migrazioni

• Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)

• Condurre racking del server, stacking e etichettatura

• Eseguire le connessioni incrociate e il lavoro del pannello patch

• Risoluzione dei problemi di connettività e hardware

• Documenta tutto il lavoro con foto e note dettagliate

• Coordinare con i team di NOC e client remoti

Requisiti:
• 2 anni di esperienza nel data center o nell'infrastruttura IT

• Forte capacità di cablaggio (Cat5e/6/6a, fibra monomodale/multi-mode)

• Esperienza con hardware server (Dell, HP, Supermicro)

• Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti rialzati

• Trasporto proprio e capacità di lavorare in loco

• Capacità di comunicazione professionale in inglese

• Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, o simili) - preferito

• Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferito

• Esperienza con DCIM e sistemi di ticketing - preferito

• Familiarità con i principali fornitori di colocalizzazione - preferito

• Utensili standard: avvitatori, tester via cavo, etichettatrici, apparecchiature di ispezione della fibra

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Biel/Bienne, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

titleByLocale.en: Data Center Technician - Switzerland - Buchs SG - On-site

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Buchs SG, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

• Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung

• Ausdauer und Urlaub

• Berufsentwicklungsbeihilfe

• Zertifizierung Sponsoring

Arbeitsplan

• Freie dauerhafte Position

• Standard Geschäftszeiten mit On-Call-Drehung

• Schaltdifferenzen für Nächte/Wochenende, wenn zutreffend

Hauptverantwortlichkeiten

• Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten

• Strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser) durchführen

• Ausführen von Hardware-Einsätzen und Stilllegungen

• Überwachung von Umweltsystemen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit)

• Auf Vorfälle reagieren und Fehlerbehebungen durchführen

• Bewahren Sie genaue Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking

• Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Betriebsteams

• Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades

Anforderungen:
• 3+ Jahre Erfahrung im Rechenzentrum

• Fachverkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser)

• Starke Fehlersuche und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten

• Erfahrungen mit Regal- und Stapelbetrieben

• Verständnis der Stromverteilung und der UPS-Systeme

• Ausgezeichnete Dokumentation und Kommunikationsfähigkeit

• Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten

• Datacenter-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt

• Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt

• Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt

• Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt

• Kenntnisse der ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt
descriptionByLocale.fr:
À propos du rôle
Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que technicien de centre de données à Crissier, Suisse . Il s'agit d'une position indépendante sur place où vous soutiendrez des infrastructures essentielles dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale.
Rémunération et avantages sociaux
80 000 à 100 000 francs par an (CHF annuel)
Ensemble complet d'avantages, notamment:

• Assurance santé, soins dentaires et assurance vision

• Congés payés et jours fériés

• Indemnité de perfectionnement professionnel

• Parrainage de la certification

Calendrier des travaux

• Position permanente libre

• Heures d'ouverture standard avec rotation sur appel

• Écarts de poste pour les nuits/fins de semaine le cas échéant

Principales responsabilités

• Installer, configurer et entretenir les équipements du serveur et du réseau

• Effectuer un câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique)

• Exécuter des déploiements et des déclassements de matériel

• Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (puissance, refroidissement, sécurité)

• Répondre aux incidents et effectuer le dépannage

• Tenir à jour la documentation exacte et le suivi des biens;

• Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation

• Participer à la planification et à la modernisation des capacités

Exigences:
• 3 ans et plus d'expérience en exploitation de data center

• Compétences de câblage expert (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes

• Expérience des opérations de rack et de pile

• Compréhension de la distribution d'électricité et des systèmes UPS

• Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication

• Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants

• Certification des centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préféré

• Certification des fournisseurs (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préféré

• Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préféré

• Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préféré

• Connaissance des pratiques de l'ITIL - préféré

jobs.description:
About the Role
 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Dielsdorf, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.
 Compensation & Benefits
 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)
 Comprehensive benefits package including:
 
• Health, dental, and vision insurance

• Paid time off and holidays

• Professional development allowance

• Certification sponsorship

 Work Schedule
 
• Freelance permanent position

• Standard business hours with on-call rotation

• Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

 Key Responsibilities
 
• Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

• Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

• Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

• Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

• Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

• Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

• Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

• Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

Requirements:
• 3+ years data center operations experience

• Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

• Experience with rack and stack operations

• Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

• Excellent documentation and communication skills

• Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

• Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

• Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

• Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni sul ruolo
Unisciti al nostro team come tecnico del Data Center di Dietlikon, Svizzera . Questa è una posizione indipendente e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture di data center di livello mondiale.
Compensazioni e vantaggi
CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuale)
Pacchetto completo di benefici tra cui:

• Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione

• Tempo libero e vacanze a pagamento

• Indennità di sviluppo professionale

• sponsorizzazione di certificazione

Programma di lavoro

• Posizione permanente libera

• Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata

• differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

Principali responsabilità

• Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete

• Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)

• Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni

• Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)

• Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi

• Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset

• Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni

• Partecipare alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti:
• 3 anni di esperienza operativa del data center

• Capacità di cablaggio esperto (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Forte risoluzione dei problemi e capacità di risoluzione dei problemi

• Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack

• Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS

• Eccellente documentazione e capacità di comunicazione

• Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti esigenti

• Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferito

• Certificazioni del venditore (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferito

• Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferito

• Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferita

• Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferito

descriptionByLocale.de:
Über die Rolle
Registrieren Sie sich als Data Center Technician in Dietlikon, Schweiz . Dies ist eine freie Position vor Ort, in der Sie kritische Infrastruktur in erstklassigen Rechenzentren unterstützen.
Vergütung & Leistungen
CHF80.000-100.000/Jahr (CHF-Jahr)
Umfassendes Leistungspaket einschließlich:

• Kranken-, Zahn- und Sehversicherung

• Ausdauer und Urlaub

• Berufsentwicklungsbeihilfe

• Zertifizierung Sponsoring

Arbeitsplan

• Freie dauerhafte Position

• Standard Geschäftszeiten mit On-Call-Drehung

• Schaltdifferenzen für Nächte/Wochenende, wenn zutreffend

Hauptverantwortlichkeiten

• Installation, Konfiguration und Wartung von Server- und Netzwerkgeräten

• Strukturierte Verkabelung (Kupfer und Glasfaser) durchführen

• Ausführen von Hardware-Einsätzen und Stilllegungen

• Überwachung von Umweltsystemen (Strom, Kühlung, Sicherheit)

• Auf Vorfälle reagieren und Fehlerbehebungen durchführen

• Bewahren Sie genaue Dokumentation und Asset-Tracking

• Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur- und Betriebsteams

• Teilnahme an Kapazitätsplanung und Upgrades

Anforderungen:
• 3+ Jahre Erfahrung im Rechenzentrum

• Fachverkabelung (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 Faser)

• Starke Fehlersuche und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten

• Erfahrungen mit Regal- und Stapelbetrieben

• Verständnis der Stromverteilung und der UPS-Systeme

• Ausgezeichnete Dokumentation und Kommunikationsfähigkeit

• Fähigkeit, 50+ lbs zu heben und in anspruchsvollen Umgebungen zu arbeiten

• Datacenter-Zertifizierungen (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - bevorzugt

• Vendor-Zertifizierungen (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - bevorzugt

• Netzwerkzertifizierungen (CCNA, JNCIA) - bevorzugt

• Erfahrung mit DCIM-Plattformen - bevorzugt

• Kenntnisse der ITIL-Praktiken - bevorzugt
descriptionByLocale.fr:
À propos du rôle
Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que technicien de centre de données à Dietlikon, Suisse . Il s'agit d'une position indépendante sur place où vous soutiendrez des infrastructures essentielles dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale.
Rémunération et avantages sociaux
80 000 à 100 000 francs par an (CHF annuel)
Ensemble complet d'avantages, notamment:

• Assurance santé, soins dentaires et assurance vision

• Congés payés et jours fériés

• Indemnité de perfectionnement professionnel

• Parrainage de la certification

Calendrier des travaux

• Position permanente libre

• Heures d'ouverture standard avec rotation sur appel

• Écarts de poste pour les nuits/fins de semaine le cas échéant

Principales responsabilités

• Installer, configurer et entretenir les équipements du serveur et du réseau

• Effectuer un câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique)

• Exécuter des déploiements et des déclassements de matériel

• Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (puissance, refroidissement, sécurité)

• Répondre aux incidents et effectuer le dépannage

• Tenir à jour la documentation exacte et le suivi des biens;

• Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et d'exploitation

• Participer à la planification et à la modernisation des capacités

Exigences:
• 3 ans et plus d'expérience en exploitation de data center

• Compétences de câblage expert (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes

• Expérience des opérations de rack et de pile

• Compréhension de la distribution d'électricité et des systèmes UPS

• Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication

• Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants

• Certification des centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préféré

• Certification des fournisseurs (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préféré

• Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préféré

• Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préféré

• Connaissance des pratiques de l'ITIL - préféré

• Participer à la planification et à la modernisation des capacités

• Compétences de câblage expert (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Expérience des opérations de rack et de pile

• Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication

• Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préféré

• Expérience avec les plateformes DCIM - préféré

• Connaissance des pratiques de l'ITIL - préféré

 Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Emmen, Switzerland . This is a freelance, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

 CHF80,000-100,000/year (CHF annual)

• Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

• Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni sul ruolo
Unisciti al nostro team come tecnico del Data Center di Emmen, Svizzera . Questa è una posizione indipendente e in loco dove supporterete l'infrastruttura critica nelle strutture di data center di livello mondiale.
Compensazioni e vantaggi
CHF80.000-100.000/anno (CHF annuale)
Pacchetto completo di benefici tra cui:

• Assicurazione salute, dentale e visione

• Tempo libero e vacanze a pagamento

• Indennità di sviluppo professionale

• sponsorizzazione di certificazione

Programma di lavoro

• Posizione permanente libera

• Ore di lavoro standard con rotazione su chiamata

• differenziali di spostamento per notti / fine settimana quando applicabile

Principali responsabilità

• Installare, configurare e mantenere le apparecchiature server e di rete

• Eseguire il cablaggio strutturato (copper e fibra ottica)

• Eseguire implementazioni hardware e decommissioni

• Monitorare i sistemi ambientali (potenza, raffreddamento, sicurezza)

• Rispondere agli incidenti e eseguire la risoluzione dei problemi

• Mantenere la documentazione accurata e il tracciamento degli asset

• Collaborare con team di ingegneria e operazioni

• Partecipare alla pianificazione e agli aggiornamenti delle capacità

Requisiti:
• 3 anni di esperienza operativa del data center

• Capacità di cablaggio esperto (Cat6/6a, fibra OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Forte risoluzione dei problemi e capacità di risoluzione dei problemi

• Esperienza con operazioni rack e stack

• Comprensione della distribuzione di energia e dei sistemi UPS

• Eccellente documentazione e capacità di comunicazione

• Capacità di sollevare 50+ lbs e lavorare in ambienti esigenti

• Certificazioni del Data Center (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferito

• Certificazioni del venditore (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferito

• Certificazioni di rete (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferito

• Esperienza con piattaforme DCIM - preferita

• Conoscenza delle pratiche ITIL - preferito

Rejoignez notre équipe en tant que technicien de centre de données à Gais, Suisse . Il s'agit d'une position indépendante sur place où vous soutiendrez des infrastructures essentielles dans des installations de data center de classe mondiale.
Rémunération et avantages sociaux
80 000 à 100 000 francs par an (CHF annuel)
Ensemble complet d'avantages, notamment:

• Assurance santé, soins dentaires et assurance vision

• Congés payés et jours fériés

• Indemnité de perfectionnement professionnel

• Parrainage de la certification

Calendrier des travaux

• Position permanente libre

• Heures d'ouverture standard avec rotation sur appel

• Écarts de poste pour les nuits/fins de semaine le cas échéant

Principales responsabilités

• Installer, configurer et entretenir les équipements du serveur et du réseau

• Effectuer un câblage structuré (cuivre et fibre optique)

• Exécuter des déploiements et des déclassements de matériel

• Surveiller les systèmes environnementaux (puissance, refroidissement, sécurité)

• Participer à la planification et à la modernisation des capacités

Exigences:

• Compétences de câblage expert (Cat6/6a, fibre OM3/OM4/OS2)

• Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes

• Expérience des opérations de rack et de pile

• Compréhension de la distribution d'électricité et des systèmes UPS

• Excellentes compétences en documentation et communication

• Capacité de soulever 50 lbs et de travailler dans des environnements exigeants

• Certification des centres de données (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - préféré

• Certification des fournisseurs (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - préféré

• Certifications réseau (CCNA, JNCIA) - préféré
